title: Overprovision Node Capacity For A Cluster — What's next
text:
Learn more about
PriorityClasses
and how they affect pod scheduling.
Explore
node autoscaling
to dynamically adjust your cluster's size based on workload demands.
Understand
Pod preemption
, a
key mechanism for Kubernetes to handle resource contention. The same page covers
eviction
,
which is less relevant to the placeholder Pod approach, but is also a mechanism for Kubernetes
to react when resources are contended.
